items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of the IDOR vulnerability scenario. While the exploratory step aims to validate a specific security scenario, there are no details or evidence of how this scenario is executed or tested within the system. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
